title: dungeons arise seven seas sparse structures compat
description: WDA seven seas compat with sparse structures
body:
Allows structures from WDA to be configed individually with sparse structures. 

when you type /dumpstructuresets ingame (via sparse structures) you used to only get a minor structure set, this compat makes it to where you will set every individual structure with sparse structures. 
![code of the file that the mod makes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a04fe84d32d5049e18c170d77d479cd89fe18ec1.png)
this example is from regular dungeons arise, seven seas only has the minor structures

minor structures is unicorn galleon

I needed to leave this file named the same as the mods to replace it via datapack.

I also have a seperate compat mod for regular dungeons arise and sparse structures.
![wabbanode banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87b19f4b9068d4a344b05dda840b8b088e3be4f7.png)
